name: Rice and Endive Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 small Carrots, peeled and cut into half moons
28 oz Can whole plum tomatoes, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package instructions.
2. Meanwhile, sauté the onions, celery, and carrots in olive oil until tender.
3. Add the vegetable stock and tomatoes to the pot. Simmer for about 15 minutes.
4. Stir in the cooked rice. Add parsley and basil. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve.
